subject: Seperate CDS chart from SDNC in OOM
commit_message:
Seperate CDS chart from SDNC in OOM

Issue-ID: OOM-2085
Signed-off-by: Abdelmuhaimen Seaudi <abdelmuhaimen.seaudi@orange.com>
Change-Id: I21fed8c9cf33967f62f156cac96deefdcb4f8d47
